items.retrieval_query: Hello, hi, good morning, good afternoon, good evening

items.expected_agent_utterance: I am _____ from adventure team on Mahindra & Mahindra
items.retrieval_query: I am calling from the adventure team, this is _____ from Mahindra

items.item_text: Explain the purpose and duration of the call
items.expected_agent_utterance: We are conducting a short feedback exercise to understand customer preferences for Adventure experiences. This will help us improve future events. The call will take about 8–10 minutes. Your responses will be kept confidential and used only for analysis purposes.
items.retrieval_query: I am calling to do a short feedback survey about adventure events, it will take about 8 to 10 minutes
May I know your age, can you tell me your age
What is your profession, may I know your job or occupation

items.item_text: Ask how many people are in the customer's family
items.expected_agent_utterance: How many people are there in your family?
items.retrieval_query: How many people are in your family, family size

items.item_text: Ask which vehicle or vehicles the customer owns
items.expected_agent_utterance: Which vehicle or vehicles do you own?
items.retrieval_query: Which vehicle or vehicles do you own, what vehicles do you have

items.item_text: Ask how the customer first came across the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: How did you first come across the Mahindra Adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: How did you first hear about the adventure event, where did you come across the event

items.item_text: Ask what part of the event caught the customer's interest initially
items.expected_agent_utterance: What part of the event caught your interest initially?
items.retrieval_query: What part of the event interested you initially, what caught your interest first

items.item_text: Ask what stopped the customer from subscribing to the event
items.expected_agent_utterance: What stopped you from finally subscribing to the event?
items.retrieval_query: What stopped you from subscribing to the event, why didn't you subscribe

items.item_text: Ask if the customer was looking for any other outdoor experiences
items.expected_agent_utterance: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?
items.retrieval_query: Were you looking for other outdoor experiences, any other outdoor activities you considered

items.item_text: If yes, ask which other outdoor experiences the customer looked at
items.expected_agent_utterance: If yes, which ones did you look at?
items.retrieval_query: If yes, which other outdoor experiences did you look at, what other activities interested you
items.condition_text: Ask only if customer answered Yes to looking for other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?

items.item_text: If yes, ask where the customer heard about these other outdoor experiences
items.expected_agent_utterance: And where did you hear about these other outdoor experiences?
items.retrieval_query: Where did you hear about these other outdoor experiences, source of other activities information
items.condition_text: Ask only if customer answered Yes to looking for other outdoor experiences
items.condition_source_item_hint: Were you also looking for any other outdoor experiences? Yes or No?

items.item_text: Ask how early the customer expects to be informed before an event
items.expected_agent_utterance: According to you, how early should we inform you before an adventure event?
items.retrieval_query: How early should we inform you before an event, preferred notification time

items.item_text: Ask what one thing could be improved to make the customer consider subscribing
items.expected_agent_utterance: What is the one thing we could improve that would make you consider subscribing in the future?
items.retrieval_query: What one thing can we improve to make you consider subscribing, suggestions for improvement
